creator: phil.budne@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 230097
patch to update lang/snobol4 from 2.2.1 to 2.2.2, generated with git diff

I'm the maintainer of the port and the underlying package.

I've released a new version, with minor changes (including one that makes a "post-patch" in the Makefile unnecessary).

I've run portlint, built under poudriere, and done the suggested sequence of make commands.

Please be kind, this is only my second update of the port, and I won't be shocked if I've gotten something wrong (or Standard Operating Procedure has changed in the past year)!
